subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The True One, exalted be His glory, declareth: This is the Day of God, and the lights of His countenance shine forth from the supreme horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی حق جل جلاله میفرماید امروز یوم الله است و انوار وجه از افق اعلی مشرق و
